business_hours.days: Monday to Friday (October to April), 7 days a week (May to September)
business_hours.start: 8:00 AM (October to April), 7:00 AM (May to September)
business_hours.end: 5:00 PM (October to April), 8:00 PM (May to September)

non_emergency_routing_rules: message only, next business day callback

call_transfer_rules.if_transfer_fails: tell the caller we'll call back in 30 minutes

integration_constraints: do not create ServiceTitan job for commercial refrigeration clients
after_hours_flow_summary: message only, next business day callback for non-emergencies
notes: always confirm caller's address, prioritize residential emergencies in summer
